qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Server-Side Template Injection in discount/shipping rule formulas permits remote code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes SQL Injection in the TotalRevenue widget via unsanitized widget settings interpolated into sprintf-based SQL. This finding describes Twig SSTI in Formulas.php via formula field injection — a different vulnerable function, different endpoint, different CWE (CWE-1336 SSTI vs CWE-89 SQL Injection), and different root cause. Surface similarity (same craftcms/commerce package, both achieve RCE) is insufficient for match.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause. The advisory describes SQL Injection in the Craft Commerce TotalRevenue widget where unsanitized widget settings are interpolated into a sprintf-based SQL Expression (CWE-89). The only qualifying finding 'ssti-formula-rce' targets the same package (craftcms/commerce) but describes Twig SSTI in Formulas.php via discount/shipping rule formula injection — a different vulnerable function, endpoint, and root cause (CWE-1336 vs CWE-89).
evidence: Advisory root cause: SQL Injection via unsanitized widget settings in TotalRevenue stat interpolated into sprintf-based SQL Expression
Advisory affected component: TotalRevenue widget in craftcms/commerce
Finding 'ssti-formula-rce': Twig SSTI in Formulas.php evaluateCondition/evaluateFormula, different vulnerable function and root cause
